items.title: Adapter Pattern
items.description: Explains the Adapter pattern for bridging incompatible interfaces so existing classes can work together cleanly.

items.title: Bridge Pattern
items.description: Explains the Bridge pattern for separating abstractions from implementations so both can evolve independently.

items.title: Composite Pattern
items.description: Explains the Composite pattern for modeling part-whole hierarchies and treating single objects and object groups uniformly.

items.title: Decorator Pattern
items.description: Explains the Decorator pattern for adding responsibilities to objects dynamically without relying on subclassing.

items.title: Facade Pattern
items.description: Explains the Facade pattern for exposing a simple interface over complex subsystems to reduce coupling.

items.title: Proxy Pattern
items.description: Explains the Proxy pattern for controlling access to another object through an intermediary with the same interface.
